rice.planting: Plant rice in flooded fields. Sow seeds 2-3 cm deep. Space rows 20 cm apart. Best season: June-July (monsoon).
rice.pests: Common pests: Stem borer, leaf folder. Use neem oil spray. Mix 10ml neem oil per liter water. Spray early morning.
rice.fertilizer: Apply urea 50kg per acre after 20 days. Use DAP 25kg at planting. Add potash 12kg before flowering.
rice.harvest: Harvest when 80% grains turn golden yellow. Usually 120-140 days after planting. Cut and dry for 3-4 days.

wheat.planting: Sow wheat in November. Seed rate: 40kg per acre. Row spacing: 20cm. Depth: 5cm.
wheat.pests: Watch for aphids and termites. Use neem cake in soil. Spray neem oil if needed.
wheat.fertilizer: Apply urea 50kg, DAP 50kg per acre. Split urea: half at sowing, half after 30 days.
wheat.harvest: Harvest in March-April when grains are hard. Takes 120-150 days from sowing.

corn.planting: Plant corn in rows 60cm apart. Seeds 20cm apart in row. Depth: 5cm. Season: February-March or July-August.
corn.pests: Common: Fall armyworm, stem borer. Remove affected leaves. Use neem spray weekly.
corn.fertilizer: Use compost 5 tons per acre. Add urea 60kg in 2 splits: at 20 and 40 days.
corn.harvest: Ready in 90-110 days. Harvest when kernels are firm and milky inside.

general.soil_preparation: Plow field 2-3 times. Add organic manure 5-10 tons per acre. Level the field properly. Ensure good drainage.
general.irrigation: Water early morning or evening. Check soil moisture by hand. If top 5cm is dry, water deeply. Avoid overwatering.
general.organic_pest_control: Neem oil spray: 10ml per liter water. Garlic spray: Crush 100g garlic in 1 liter water, strain and spray. Chili spray: Boil 100g chili in water, cool and spray.
general.composting: Mix kitchen waste, dry leaves, cow dung. Keep moist. Turn every week. Ready in 2-3 months. Use 5kg per plant.

fever.symptoms: Body temperature above 100°F (37.8°C), feeling hot, sweating, weakness, body ache.
fever.home_treatment: Rest completely. Drink plenty of water and fluids. Take paracetamol 500mg every 6 hours. Sponge with lukewarm water.
fever.when_to_see_doctor: If fever lasts more than 3 days, temperature above 103°F, severe headache, difficulty breathing, or rash appears.
fever.prevention: Drink clean water. Wash hands frequently. Avoid mosquito bites. Get adequate sleep.

cold_cough.symptoms: Runny nose, sneezing, cough, sore throat, mild fever, body ache.
cold_cough.home_treatment: Drink warm water with honey and ginger. Steam inhalation 2-3 times daily. Gargle with salt water. Rest well.
cold_cough.when_to_see_doctor: If cough lasts more than 2 weeks, blood in cough, high fever, chest pain, or difficulty breathing.
cold_cough.prevention: Avoid cold drinks. Cover mouth when coughing. Wash hands regularly. Avoid crowded places during flu season.

stomach_pain.symptoms: Pain in belly area, cramping, bloating, nausea, loss of appetite.
stomach_pain.home_treatment: Avoid heavy food. Drink warm water. Eat light food like rice, curd. Rest. Take antacid if needed.
stomach_pain.when_to_see_doctor: If pain is severe, lasts more than 6 hours, vomiting blood, black stool, or fever with pain.
stomach_pain.prevention: Eat fresh food. Drink clean water. Wash hands before eating. Avoid overeating.

headache.symptoms: Pain in head, pressure feeling, sensitivity to light or sound.
headache.home_treatment: Rest in quiet dark room. Apply cold compress on forehead. Drink water. Take paracetamol if needed. Massage temples gently.
headache.when_to_see_doctor: If headache is sudden and severe, with fever and stiff neck, vision changes, or after head injury.
headache.prevention: Get adequate sleep. Drink enough water. Avoid stress. Eat regular meals.

paracetamol.dosage: Adults: 500-1000mg every 6-8 hours. Maximum 4000mg per day. Children: Consult doctor.
paracetamol.precautions: Do not exceed maximum dose. Avoid alcohol. Take with food if stomach upset.

antacid.dosage: 1-2 tablets after meals and at bedtime. Or as directed by doctor.
antacid.precautions: Do not take with other medicines. Wait 2 hours. Drink plenty of water.

first_aid.cuts_wounds: Wash with clean water. Apply pressure to stop bleeding. Clean with antiseptic. Cover with clean bandage. Change daily.
first_aid.burns: Cool with running water for 10 minutes. Do not apply ice, oil, or toothpaste. Cover with clean cloth. See doctor if severe.
first_aid.snake_bite: Keep calm. Immobilize affected part. Remove jewelry. Do not cut or suck wound. Rush to hospital immediately.
first_aid.insect_bite: Wash area with soap and water. Apply ice pack. Take antihistamine if itching. See doctor if swelling increases.

fraud_awareness.otp_scam: NEVER share OTP (One Time Password) with anyone. Banks never ask for OTP on phone. OTP is only for you to enter on website or app.
fraud_awareness.lottery_scam: You cannot win a lottery you did not enter. Do not send money to claim prize. Do not share bank details.
fraud_awareness.fake_call_scam: Banks never call asking for full card number, CVV, or PIN. Do not share these details on phone. Hang up and call bank directly.
fraud_awareness.link_scam: Do not click links in unknown messages. They can steal your information. Delete suspicious messages.
fraud_awareness.impersonation: Verify caller identity before sharing information. Call back on official number. Do not trust caller ID alone.

home_safety.fire_prevention: Do not leave cooking unattended. Keep matchboxes away from children. Check gas connections regularly. Have fire extinguisher.
home_safety.electrical_safety: Do not touch switches with wet hands. Do not overload sockets. Check wiring regularly. Turn off appliances when not in use.
home_safety.water_safety: Boil drinking water or use filter. Store water in clean containers. Cover water storage. Clean tanks regularly.

time_management.morning_routine: Wake up early. Drink water. Exercise or walk. Eat healthy breakfast. Plan your day.
time_management.medication_schedule: Take medicines at same time daily. Keep medicine box organized. Set reminders. Do not skip doses.
time_management.meal_times: Breakfast: 7-9 AM. Lunch: 12-2 PM. Dinner: 7-9 PM. Eat at regular times. Do not skip meals.

communication.making_calls: Speak clearly and slowly. State your name first. Explain purpose of call. Listen carefully to response.
communication.receiving_calls: Answer politely. Verify caller identity. Do not share personal information to unknown callers. Ask to call back if unsure.
communication.messages: Keep messages short and clear. Read carefully before sending. Do not share sensitive information via message.
